_NOTE_META: CONFIG_VERSION tracks structural changes to this file. Increment when keys are added, renamed, or removed (not for value-only changes). The bot checks this at startup and warns if the file version is behind the code's expected version.
_NOTE_EXECUTION: EXECUTION_MODE controls how the bot operates. MANUAL = signals + Telegram alerts only, you place orders yourself. PAPER = simulate trades (no real orders). AUTO = bot places orders automatically (requires BROKER_API_ENABLED + filled BROKER_CONFIG). Priority: always start with MANUAL. See SETUP_AND_TRADING_GUIDE.md.
_NOTE_CAPITAL: LOW CAPITAL SETTINGS — Start with 2000 or 5000. MAX_DAILY_LOSS is the hard stop (negative). MAX_DRAWDOWN as fraction (0.3 = 30%).
_NOTE_RISK: RISK_MODE FIXED = fixed rupee risk per trade; PERCENT = % of capital. RISK_FIXED_AMOUNT used when FIXED.
_NOTE_SL_TARGET: SL/Target/Trail as multipliers of entry price. e.g. SL_PCT=0.88 means stop at 88% of entry price.
_NOTE_BROKER: BROKER_NAME is a display label only. BROKER_DRIVER selects the adapter: GENERIC (default/paper-safe), KITE (Zerodha), ANGEL (AngelOne), CUSTOM (use BROKER_CUSTOM_FACTORY). BROKER_API_ENABLED must be true to actually place orders. BROKER_CONFIG holds credentials for the selected broker — leave blank for MANUAL/PAPER mode. For a custom broker integration set BROKER_CUSTOM_FACTORY to module:function (e.g. mybroker.adapter:create_adapter).

BROKER_CONFIG._NOTE: Credentials read from OPBUYING_BROKER_API_KEY, OPBUYING_BROKER_ACCESS_TOKEN, OPBUYING_BROKER_USER_ID, OPBUYING_BROKER_PASSWORD env vars. Do NOT store plaintext credentials here.

_NOTE_INDEX_MAP: INDEX_MAP defines which indices to trade and their contract specs. Override only the fields you need — the rest use built-in defaults. Fields: yf=Yahoo Finance ticker, nse=NSE symbol, step=strike step, lot=lot size. Add new indices here and they are automatically picked up without code changes.
_NOTE_INDEX_PRIORITY: Order in which indices are scanned. First entry is highest priority. Must match keys in INDEX_MAP.
_NOTE_DATA: DATA_PROVIDER_PRIORITY controls fallback chain. First live provider wins. Disable unused providers to reduce noise.
_NOTE_SIGNAL: AI_THRESHOLD is the minimum score (0-100) for a signal to be considered. Higher = fewer but higher-quality signals.
_NOTE_TIMING: SCAN_INTERVAL seconds between scans. COOLDOWN seconds after a trade before the next. MIN_TRADE_DURATION_MINS blocks entries too close to EOD.
_NOTE_VIX: VIX_HALT_THRESHOLD raises score bar; VIX_BLOCK_THRESHOLD blocks all entries. Must have BLOCK > HALT.
_NOTE_SLIPPAGE: SLIPPAGE is base; SLIPPAGE_VIX_FACTOR adds extra when VIX is high.
_NOTE_TELEGRAM: TG_QUIET_MODE suppresses non-critical messages. TG_TRADE_ONLY sends alerts only for trade events. TG_SIGNAL_COOLDOWN is min seconds between duplicate signal alerts.
_NOTE_ADVANCED_SAFETY: Advanced execution guards — all soft-reload safe. SPREAD_MAX_PCT blocks entry if bid-ask spread is too wide. SLIPPAGE_ALERT_PCT fires a warning when observed slippage exceeds this. DRAWDOWN_SIZE_SCALE reduces lot size automatically when portfolio drawdown is severe. VIX_SIZE_SCALE reduces lot size when VIX is elevated. VIX_COOLDOWN_SEC holds off entries for N seconds after VIX drops from a spike. CONSEC_LOSS_LIMIT trips a circuit-break pause after N consecutive losses. TG_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL is the periodic 'bot alive' Telegram ping. MIN_ENTRY_INTERVAL prevents rapid double-entry on the same index. CLUSTER_WINDOW_SEC suppresses a weaker duplicate signal within this window. MONDAY_GAP_GRACE_MIN skips entries in the first N minutes on Monday to avoid gap-fades.
_NOTE_SAFETY: CIRCUIT_BREAKER_THRESHOLD consecutive failures trips a cooldown. WATCHDOG_TIMEOUT seconds without a loop heartbeat triggers an alert.
_NOTE_ORDER_RETRIES: These are used only when BROKER_API_ENABLED=true. Safe defaults for MANUAL mode.
_NOTE_GUI: GUI_REFRESH_MS controls how often the GUI updates. GUI_CONFIRM_EXIT shows a confirmation before closing. Leave GUI_THEME/GUI_WINDOW/GUI_UX as {} to use built-in defaults.
_NOTE_LOGGING: AUDIT_LOG_ENABLED writes a JSONL audit trail. RETENTION_* controls how long files are kept. STRUCTURED_EVENTS_ENABLED writes machine-readable events.
_NOTE_OBSERVABILITY: METRICS_PORT>0 serves /metrics and /health on METRICS_BIND. Default 0 = disabled. Port/bind changes need restart.
_NOTE_DIAGNOSTICS: Operational tuning knobs — safe to soft-reload. CRASH_RECOVERY_LOG path for crash events. COMPACT_INTERVAL_SEC how often memory is compacted. LOOP_SLOW_CYCLE_MS threshold (ms) to flag a slow scan cycle. LOOP_HEALTH_REPORT_EVERY_N how often (iterations) to print a loop-health summary.
_NOTE_SIGNAL_TUNING: Signal engine tuning — all soft-reload safe (no restart needed). ATR_SL_MULTIPLIER controls how many ATRs the stop-loss sits from entry. PCR_BULLISH/BEARISH set the OI ratio thresholds that add 5 pts to score. MACD_BONUS pts added when MACD histogram confirms direction. STRONG/MODERATE_THRESHOLD set the score bands shown in the GUI. FIB_TP*_RATIO are Fibonacci extension multipliers for TP1/TP2/TP3 targets. Tune these to match your risk tolerance — restart NOT required.
_NOTE_TIER_ENGINE: Tiered adaptive signal framework. STRONG>=80 (full position), MODERATE 70-79 (60% position), WEAK 60-69 (30% position, disabled by default). TIER_TRADE_WEAK=true enables WEAK signals. TIER_USE_ADAPTIVE shifts entry threshold by market regime.
_NOTE_EXECUTION_POLICY: ExecutionPolicy controls trade entry rules. quality_min_score: skip if score below this AND no breakout. custom_skip_rules: list of {name, score_max, require_breakout, regimes, tier_max}.

custom_skip_rules.name: no_vol_no_breakout
custom_skip_rules.comment: Scores 60-72 without breakout confirmation are skipped

_NOTE_BACKTEST: Backtest / replay settings — only used when running backtests, not live.
_NOTE_SECRETS: Prefix sensitive values with b64: for base64 obfuscation. Never commit this file to git. Use config.local.json (gitignored) for machine-specific overrides.
_NOTE_AUTO_TUNE: Auto-tuner runs once per day at EOD. AUTO_TUNE_ENABLED=false means it only prints a suggestion report, never writes files. Set AUTO_TUNE_DRY_RUN=false AND AUTO_TUNE_ENABLED=true to allow writes. AUTO_TUNE_MIN_TRADES is the minimum sample required before any recommendation is generated. AUTO_TUNE_COOLDOWN_DAYS prevents the same parameter from being changed again within N days — guards against oscillation. AUTO_TUNE_MIN_SAMPLES_PER_SEGMENT: if a score-bin or regime has fewer than this many trades, its confidence is capped at MEDIUM. AUTO_TUNE_MIN_EDGE_DELTA: if a segment's win-rate is within this fraction of overall win-rate (e.g. 0.05 = 5pp), the segment is considered noise and skipped.
